channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Liverpool parts ways with Arne Slot after trophy-laden tenure
item.description: Liverpool FC has announced that Arne Slot will depart from his role as head coach with immediate effect, with the club initiating the process to appoint a successor. Slot, who arrived in June 2024, st...

item.title: Waratahs finish disappointing season with loss to Force and Jake Gordon Achilles injury
item.description: The NSW Waratahs have ended a difficult Super Rugby season on a low note, falling 31-25 to the Western Force in Perth and losing Wallabies captain Jake Gordon to a serious Achilles tendon injury. The ...

item.title: IMD issues warning as dust storms and strong winds hit Delhi
item.description: On May 30, 2026, several parts of Delhi experienced dust storms and strong winds, prompting the India Meteorological Department (IMD) to issue red and orange alerts. The weather authorities forecast s...

item.title: National Capital Region defends secondary girls’ volleyball title at Palarong Pambansa after win over Negros Island Region
item.description: National Capital Region (NCR) successfully defended its secondary girls’ volleyball title at the 2026 Palarong Pambansa after defeating Negros Island Region (NIR) in four sets, 22-25, 25-14, 25-19, 25...

item.title: IPOA investigates eight deaths linked to fuel protest incidents, including custody and shooting cases
item.description: The Independent Policing Oversight Authority (IPOA) has confirmed that it is actively investigating eight separate deaths that occurred during the May 18, 2026 fuel price hike protests across Kenya. T...

item.title: Italy cancels Kanye West and Travis Scott concerts over security risks
item.description: Italian authorities have officially cancelled two upcoming concerts by US rappers Kanye West (Ye) and Travis Scott in Reggio Emilia, citing public safety and security concerns. West was due to perform...

item.title: Judge orders removal of Trump’s name from Washington’s Kennedy Centre; board decision challenged as overstepping statutory authority
item.description: A federal judge in the District of Columbia ruled that the Kennedy Centre’s board, which President Trump appointed and positioned as chairman, exceeded its statutory authority by renaming the venue af...

item.title: SADC Ministers Discuss Regional Strategies for Food Security and Agriculture
item.description: Ministers from Southern African Development Community (SADC) countries met in Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe to address pressing issues affecting food security, agriculture, and aquaculture in the region. T...

item.title: Arne Slot Thanks Liverpool Supporters Following Departure After Two Seasons as Head Coach
item.description: Former Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has spoken publicly for the first time since leaving the club, expressing appreciation to Liverpool and its supporters for their backing during his two-year spell...

item.title: Bulls dominate Munster 45-14 to reach URC semifinals in Glasgow
item.description: The Bulls delivered a commanding performance at Loftus Versfeld on Saturday, overpowering Munster 45-14 to secure a spot in the United Rugby Championship semi-finals against Glasgow Warriors. The home...

item.title: Steven Guilbeault resigns over Liberals' environmental policy disagreements
item.description: Liberal MP and former environment minister Steven Guilbeault has announced his resignation from the House of Commons, citing a divergence between his environmental principles and the party's policies....

item.title: Manyoni Water Supply Project Reaches 80 Percent Completion, Set to Expand Access for More Than 64,000 Residents
item.description: Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba has inspected the ongoing 28 billion Tanzanian shilling water supply project in Manyoni Town, Singida Region, and expressed satisfaction with the progress achieved so fa...

item.title: Technical glitch delays CUET exam amid criticism of education system
item.description: The Common University Entrance Test-Undergraduate (CUET-UG) faced delays on Saturday due to a technical glitch reported at certain examination centres. The National Testing Agency (NTA), responsible f...

item.title: US Defence Secretary Praises Pakistan's Mediation Role in US-Iran Peace Efforts
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has praised Pakistan's growing role in international diplomacy, describing Islamabad as a 'true friend' of the United States during remarks at the Shangri-La Dialogue...

item.title: APM begins presidential primaries in Ibadan as Makinde gains backing from South West stakeholders
item.description: The Allied People’s Movement (APM) don begin preparations for its presidential primary election as political activities ahead of the 2027 general elections dey gather momentum. Dis development dey com...

item.title: SpaceX IPO signals potential peak in a heated bull market
item.description: The article views SpaceX’s planned IPO as a litmus test for the strength and maturity of the current bull market. It questions the financial logic of valuing SpaceX at roughly $1.8 trillion despite su...

item.title: Burst Pipe Causes Flooding and Suspension of Rail Services at Heathrow Airport
item.description: Passengers travelling to and from Heathrow Airport faced significant disruption after a burst pipe caused flooding that led to a signal failure near Heathrow Terminals 2 and 3. The incident resulted i...

item.title: Blue Origin Rocket Explosion Expected to Delay NASA Moon Base Timeline by at Least One Year
item.description: A reported setback involving a Blue Origin rocket has raised concerns about the timeline for NASA’s planned lunar missions and the broader goal of establishing a long-term human presence on the Moon. ...

item.title: Families Identify Loved Ones After Utumishi Girls Academy Fire in Nakuru
item.description: Families of victims of the tragic fire at Utumishi Girls Academy in Gilgil, Nakuru County, have been going through intense emotional pain as they identify their deceased relatives. The fire, allegedly...

item.title: Growing US interest in Canada’s expanded citizenship-by-descent rules amid political tensions
item.description: New data from Canada’s immigration authorities shows a sharp rise in applications for proof of citizenship by descent following recent changes to the country’s citizenship laws. Under updated rules, C...
